/opt/custom-a53/1.0/sysroots/x86_64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/aarch64-poky-linux/aarch64-poky-linux-gcc   -mcpu=cortex-a53+crc -mbranch-protection=standard -fstack-protector-strong  -O2 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Wformat-security -Werror=format-security --sysroot=/opt/custom-a53/1.0/sysroots/cortexa53-poky-linux --sysroot=/opt/custom-a53/1.0/sysroots/cortexa53-poky-linux  -O2 -pipe -g -feliminate-unused-debug-types  -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--hash-style=gnu -Wl,--as-needed  -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now CMakeFiles/tcp_secure_client.dir/src/socket/tcp/tcpClientThread.c.o "CMakeFiles/tcp_secure_client.dir/src/openssl/AES256-CBC_TEST.c.o" CMakeFiles/tcp_secure_client.dir/src/openssl/sha256_TEST.c.o -o tcp_secure_client  /opt/custom-a53/1.0/sysroots/cortexa53-poky-linux/usr/lib/libcrypto.so -lpthread
